role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and climate cues consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified vegetation types (sclerophyllous, hedges) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure, utility poles, and building materials.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (pole design, architecture) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Europe) and the specific country (Portugal) based on strong visual evidence (utility poles, architecture). The agents adhered to their roles, and the meta agent's synthesis of infrastructure cues was the decisive factor.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of scrub, stone, and soil match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of hedges and Mediterranean flora match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the concrete pole and road surface match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the house style and pole design match the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction was Portugal, which matches the ground truth.
